== Notes for [[Item:Q113453|Q113453]] ==

* E4. Munio, +after 870
>* F1. Vermudo Nunez, Cde de Cea, +after 958; m. Velasquita N
>>* G1. Cde Fernando Bermudez, +after 978; m.Elvira N
>>>* H1. Gome Fernandez
>>>* H2. Jimena Fernandez, +after 1035; m.before 981 King García IV of Navarre (+999/1004)
>>>* H3. Oneca Fernandez
>>>* H4. Justa Fernandez; m.Cde Flagin Munoz (+998/1002)
>>>* H5. Gotina Fernandez; m.Pelayo Rodriguez
>>* G2. '''Vela Bermudez''', +ca 27.3.976
>>>* H1. Argilo Velaz
>>>* H2. Vermudo Velaz, Cde, +ca 1028; m. Elvira Lugo
>>* G3. Gonzalo Bermudez, Cde de Luna; m.Ildoncia, dau.of King Ramiro II of Leon
>>>* H1. a daughter; m.before 986 Cde García de Saldana
>>* G4. Froiliuba; m.Cde Munio Flaginiz (+962)

''in: Duque Pedro de Cantabria, an Visigothic leader <http://genealogy.euweb.cz/iberia/iberia2.html>''

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
